title: pyrethrum umbelliferum
intro: Pyrethrum umbelliferum, also known as the pyrethrum daisy or pyrethrum flower, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum umbelliferum are attributed to its pyrethrins, which have insecticidal and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pyrethrum umbelliferum include reducing inflammation and pain, and it has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum umbelliferum include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation.
